title: coptosperma neurophyllum
intro: Coptosperma neurophyllum, also known as the "African Violet Tree" or "Neurophyllum", is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coptosperma neurophyllum include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it can be used as a tea or applied topically as an ointment or poultice.
